## Validation

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e`

## Release Checks

- [ ] `git status` is clean locally before merge
- [ ] No generated artifacts were committed (`dist`, `coverage`, `apps/web/test-results`, traces, logs)
- [ ] Docs or env examples were updated if needed
- [ ] Migrations were reviewed if schema changed
